final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: documentary / humanistic editorial photo, landscape crop
Primary request: morning prayer ritual (Ganga Aarti) on the ghats of Varanasi, India — hundreds of Hindu devotees gathered at the stone steps along the Ganges River at dawn
Scene/backdrop: Varanasi ghats at sunrise — ancient stone steps descending to the Ganges, mist and incense smoke drifting over the water, silhouette of the far riverbank in the background
Subject: center frame — an elderly Hindu priest in saffron orange robes, holding a brass oil lamp (diya), performing puja ritual with solemn devotion amid swirling smoke; surrounding devotees — some wading into the river for ritual bathing, some standing with palms pressed together in prayer, some kneeling to float flower-filled diyas onto the water
Style/medium: 35mm film photography, humanistic documentary, rich saturated color, film grain texture
Composition/framing: golden ratio composition — foreground: soft-focus flower petals (shallow depth of field); midground: main subject priest and devotees; background: hazy silhouette of the opposite Ganges bank; medium-wide framing
Lighting/mood: golden hour dawn light rising from the horizon, bathing the entire scene in warm gold tones; soft diffused glow through incense smoke; sacred, reverent, spiritually charged atmosphere
Color palette: warm gold and amber sunrise light, deep saffron orange robes, glowing brass lamp, soft pinks and whites of floating flower offerings, muted cool tones in the background riverbank
Materials/textures: worn stone ghat steps, rippling river surface reflecting countless floating diyas and flowers, translucent smoke wisps, rough-woven fabric of robes, film grain overlay
Constraints: hundreds of floating flower diyas reflected on calm water surface; warm golden color grading throughout; strong sense of religious ritual and human warmth
Avoid: artificial studio lighting, modern urban elements, plastic objects, over-sharpened digital look, watermark
